name: codeseex
description: Local Codex-compatible DeepSeek bridge with a desktop manager.
author: TasteSteak

scripts.check: node --check src/electron/main.js && node --check src/manager/server.js && node --check src/manager/inline-control.js && node --check src/manager/process-control.js && node --check src/manager/process-cleanup.js && node --check src/manager/static/app.js && node --check src/shared/config.js && node --check src/shared/codex-auth.js && node --check src/shared/json-store.js && node --check src/proxy/server.js && node --check src/proxy/context-compiler.js && node --check src/proxy/conversation-state.js && node --check src/proxy/deepseek-client.js && node --check src/proxy/network-dispatcher.js && node --check src/proxy/streaming/index.js && node --check src/proxy/web-search-executor.js && node --check src/tools/apply-patch/index.js && node --check src/codex/model-catalog.js && node --check src/codex/build-catalog-seed.js && node --check test/test-context-compiler.js && node --check test/test-agent-state.js && node --check test/test-catalog-seed.js && node --check test/test-apply-patch-native.js && node --check test/test-mcp-smoke.js && node --check test/test-desktop-manager.js && node --check test/test-responses-compact.js && npm run test:context && npm run test:agent-state && npm run test:catalog-seed && npm run test:apply-patch && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:compact && npm run test:desktop-manager
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:catalog-seed && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:catalog-seed && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:catalog-seed && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb tar.gz
